template.approved: Dear {{customer_name}}, your loan of {{currency}} {{amount}} has been approved. Ref: {{reference}}
template.disbursed: Dear {{customer_name}}, {{currency}} {{amount}} has been disbursed to your wallet. Ref: {{reference}}
template.reminder: Reminder: Your payment of {{currency}} {{amount}} is due on {{due_date}}. Ref: {{reference}}
template.overdue: Alert: Your payment of {{currency}} {{amount}} is overdue since {{due_date}}. Please pay immediately. Ref: {{reference}}

wizard.setProductIdentity: Set the core identity of the product.

wizard.gracePeriodHelp: Days after due date before penalties apply

wizard.autoApproveDesc: Loans are auto-approved when the credit score clears the threshold.
wizard.manualDesc: All loans require manual review by an operator
wizard.hybridDesc: Auto-approve above threshold, manual review below
wizard.thresholdHelpHybrid: Scores above the threshold auto-approve. Below it, manual review.
wizard.slaHelp: Maximum hours to process an application
wizard.reviewDesc: Review all product settings before saving.
wizard.maxConcurrentLoans: Max concurrent active loans per customer
wizard.customRulesDesc: Optional JSON array of custom rules. Each rule needs "field", "operator", and "value".
wizard.automaticDesc: Loans are auto-approved when the credit score clears the threshold.
wizard.scoresAboveAutoApproved: Scores above this are auto-approved; below go to manual review
wizard.maxHoursToProcess: Maximum hours to process an application
wizard.feesDesc: Fee structure for this product. Leave amount blank or 0 to disable a fee.
wizard.originationFeeDesc: One-time fee charged at loan disbursement
wizard.latePenaltyDesc: Fee applied when a repayment is overdue
wizard.insuranceDesc: Insurance premium charged on the loan
wizard.notificationsDesc: Notification copy sent at each loan lifecycle event.
wizard.noTemplatesHint: Add templates to notify customers about loan events.
wizard.fundingSourceDesc: Funding lender, insurance, and revenue split for this product.
wizard.selfFundedHint: Self-funded products use the SP's own balance sheet. Revenue sharing: 0% lender, 100% SP.
wizard.lenderOptional: Optional. Select an active lender to fund this product.
wizard.revenueShareExceeds100: Total revenue shares exceed 100%. Please adjust lender share.

financial.coolingOffHelp: Consumer protection period after disbursement during which the customer can cancel. Set to 0 to disable.
